Package eu.algites.lib.common.enums.uiddata

Class AIcUidEnumDataRegistry

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.enums.uiddata.AIcUidEnumDataRegistry
All Implemented Interfaces:
AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
public class AIcUidEnumDataRegistry extends Object implements AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
Default singleton implementation of AIiUidEnumDataRegistry.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static AIcUidEnumDataRegistry getInstance()
      Gets the registry instance.
      Returns:
      registry instance

    • registerData

      @SafeVarargs public final <DT extends AIiUidEnumDataType<?, ?>, T extends AIiUidEnumData<?, ?, DT>> List<T> registerData(boolean aReadOnly, boolean aPermanent, boolean aOverwriteExisting, T... aDataToRegister) throws AIxEnumDataRegistryIllegalOperationException
      Description copied from interface: AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
      Registers the given data items.
      Specified by:
      registerData in interface AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
      Type Parameters:
      DT - type of the enum data type expected.
      T - type of the enum data expected.
      Parameters:
      aReadOnly - defines, if the data have to be registered as read only, co cannot be overwritten with the re-registration
      aPermanent - defines, if the data have to be registered as permanent, i.e. they cannot be removed from the registry by call of AIiUidEnumDataRegistry.releaseData(AIiUidEnumData[]) or AIiUidEnumDataRegistry.releaseData(AIiUidEnumDataType, String...)
      aOverwriteExisting - if the overwriting of the existing data is forced. If it is so and the item is read-only, then AIxEnumDataRegistryIllegalOperationException is thrown. if this parameter is false and the item exists, then it is not overwritten, no exception is thrown, and the method returns an empty list.
      aDataToRegister - data to be registered
      Returns:
      list of registered data items
      Throws:
      AIxEnumDataRegistryIllegalOperationException - in the case the overwrite of the read only item is forced.

    • releaseData

      @SafeVarargs public final <DT extends AIiUidEnumDataType<?, ?>, T extends AIiUidEnumData<?, ?, DT>> List<T> releaseData(T... aDataToRelease) throws AIxEnumDataRegistryIllegalOperationException
      Description copied from interface: AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
      Releases the given data items.
      Specified by:
      releaseData in interface AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
      Type Parameters:
      DT - type of the enum data type expected.
      T - type of the enum data expected.
      Parameters:
      aDataToRelease - data to be released
      Returns:
      list of released data items
      Throws:
      AIxEnumDataRegistryIllegalOperationException - if some of the data which should be released is marked as permanent

    • releaseData

      public final <DT extends AIiUidEnumDataType<?, ?>, T extends AIiUidEnumData<?, ?, DT>> List<T> releaseData(DT aDataType, String... aUidToRelease) throws AIxEnumDataRegistryIllegalOperationException
      Description copied from interface: AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
      Releases the data items of the given data type for the given UIDs.
      Specified by:
      releaseData in interface AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
      Type Parameters:
      DT - type of the enum data type expected.
      T - type of the enum data expected.
      Parameters:
      aDataType - data type of the items to be released
      aUidToRelease - UIDs of the items to be released
      Returns:
      list of released data items
      Throws:
      AIxEnumDataRegistryIllegalOperationException - if some of the data which should be released is marked as permanent

    • findByUid

      public final <DT extends AIiUidEnumDataType<?, ?>, T extends AIiUidEnumData<?, ?, DT>> Optional<T> findByUid(DT aDataType, String aUid)
      Description copied from interface: AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
      Finds the data item by UID.
      Specified by:
      findByUid in interface AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
      Type Parameters:
      DT - type of the enum data type expected.
      T - type of the enum data expected.
      Parameters:
      aDataType - data type of the item to be found
      aUid - UID of the item to be found
      Returns:
      optional of the found item

    • getOrThrow

      public final <DT extends AIiUidEnumDataType<?, ?>, T extends AIiUidEnumData<?, ?, DT>> T getOrThrow(DT aDataType, String aUid) throws AIxEnumDataRegistryItemNotFoundException
      Description copied from interface: AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
      Gets the data item by UID.
      Specified by:
      getOrThrow in interface AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
      Type Parameters:
      DT - type of the enum data type expected.
      T - type of the enum data expected.
      Parameters:
      aDataType - data type of the item to be found
      aUid - UID of the item to be found
      Returns:
      the found item
      Throws:
      AIxEnumDataRegistryItemNotFoundException - if the item is not found

    • items

      public final <DT extends AIiUidEnumDataType<?, ?>, T extends AIiUidEnumData<?, ?, DT>> List<T> items(DT aDataType)
      Description copied from interface: AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
      Gets all data items of the given data type.
      Specified by:
      items in interface AIiUidEnumDataRegistry
      Type Parameters:
      DT - data type of the items to be found
      T - type of the enum data expected.
      Parameters:
      aDataType - data type of the items to be found
      Returns:
      list of found items
